meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS pricing to Solve stuck with basic apps (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS pricing and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: SaaS Pricing to Solve Stuck App Syndrome
content.seo_description: Break free from basic app development. Master SaaS pricing strategies and accelerate your workflow using Antigravity and Claude Code as a freelancer.
content.answer_block: Stop building features for free. To transition from basic apps to high-ticket SaaS, implement value-based pricing tiers: Starter, Pro, and Enterprise. Use Antigravity to scaffold your billing architecture and Claude Code to automate Stripe integration, ensuring your technical infrastructure supports scalable revenue growth immediately.
content.intro:
You are staring at another 'To-Do' list app, wondering why your freelance revenue hasn't moved despite shipping every day. You're trapped in the cycle of building basic, low-value software that clients treat as a commodity. The difference between a struggling freelancer and a high-end SaaS architect isn't just code quality; it's the ability to wrap that code in a high-conversion pricing model.

It’s time to stop trading hours for pennies. By leveraging AI-driven workflows, we will transform your development process into a recurring revenue engine. This guide shows you how to integrate professional-grade pricing tiers into your apps, moving you from a 'builder' to a strategic partner for your clients.

steps.title: Architecting the Pricing Tiers
steps.description: Before writing a line of code, define your value metrics. Use Antigravity to generate a schema that supports multi-tenant billing.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a database schema for a SaaS platform with three tiers: Starter, Pro, and Enterprise. Include fields for usage-based limits and feature flags.

steps.title: Scaffolding the Checkout Flow
steps.description: Build a frictionless checkout experience. We use Antigravity to map out the Stripe API integration points.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a React checkout component that dynamically updates based on the selected pricing tier, integrating Stripe Elements.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal 'npm install @stripe/stripe-js stripe' && claude run 'checkout-flow.tsx'

steps.title: Implementing Feature Gating
steps.description: Ensure users only access what they pay for by implementing middleware that checks subscription status.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a Next.js middleware function that restricts access to premium routes based on user subscription status from the database.

steps.title: Automating Webhook Handlers
steps.description: Handle subscription lifecycle events like cancellations or upgrades using robust webhook handlers.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a secure Express webhook handler for Stripe events: customer.subscription.updated and invoice.payment_failed.

steps.title: Deploying the Billing Engine
steps.description: Finalize your production environment with environment variables and secure API key management.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a deployment checklist for a SaaS billing engine focusing on security, environment variables, and log monitoring.

pro_tips: Always price by the 'Outcome,' not the 'Output'—charge for the business problem you solve, not the lines of code you write.
Implement 'Expansion Revenue' early by including a usage-based tier that grows automatically as your client succeeds.
Use mock billing data in your dev environment to test edge cases like failed payments before your client ever sees the dashboard.
Offer a 'White-glove' Enterprise tier that includes a dedicated Slack channel; it increases your perceived value tenfold.
Never hardcode your pricing. Use a remote config service so you can adjust your SaaS pricing tiers without a full redeployment.
content.next_steps: Once your billing engine is live, audit your client's current app for one 'hidden' feature that can be moved behind a paywall to generate immediate MRR.
content.conversion_block: Stop building for free and start building for scale. You have the tools, the architecture, and the strategy to command premium rates. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
